verses.text: Judah gam kumpi Jotham, Ahaz, leh Hezekiah-te' hun laitakin, Moresheth khuami Mikah tungah Topa in thu a pia hi. Samaria leh Jerusalem tawh kisai-in Topa in Mikah tungah hih thute a lak hi
No minam khempeuhte aw, hih thu za un: Leitungah a teng mi khempeuhte aw, hih thu ngai un: Note' langkhatah Topa Pasian in teci pang a, a vantung biakinn panin thu hong gen hi
Ama mun siangtho panin Topa hong pai a, amah in leitung mualsang dawnte hong siksuk ding hi
Meikhuk sungah khuainun a kikoih bangin ama khenuai-ah mualliante tuisuak ding a, mualtung panin tui a luangsuk bangin, guamsungah tua mualte luangsuk ding hi

Pasian' tungah Israel-te' mawhna leh a khialhnate uh hangin hih thute khempeuh a piang ahi hi. Israel-te' khialhna kua ngawh ding ihi hiam? Samaria mite ngawh ding ihi hiam? Judah gamsungah milim bia-in a khial kua ahi hiam? Jerusalem mite ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Samaria khuapi, gamlaka ninkholna mun, leenggui suanna mun lel dingin ka bawl ding hi. A khuasunga suangte zong guamsungah ka nilsuk ding a, a khuapi bulpite ka dawksak ding hi

A milim manphate khempeuh kisuzan gawp ding a, mei tawh kisusia ding hi. Pasian' tungah a thumanlohna hangun mihingte in hih milimte nei uh ahih manin, a thumanlohna uh tawh kizui-in tu-in thuakkik ding uh hi, ci hi
Tua ahih manin kei kapin ka thum ding a, ka dahna thu ka lahna dingin khe guak leh guaktangin ka vak ding hi. Gam-ui bangin ka ham ding a, vasa-kalaoh bangin ka tau ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Samaria' meima kidamsak theilo hi; Judah in zong tua bangmah a thuak ding ahi ta hi. Ka mite' ten'na Jerusalem khua mahmah, tua siatna in hong ban ta hi
I guallelhna thu Gath khuamite theisak kei un la, na kahna uh amaute musak kei un. Bethleafrah khuasungah na lungkhamna uh langsakin, leivui lakah kikhuk un

Shafir khua-ah a teng mite aw, guaktangin maizumna tawh salin pai un. Zanaan khua-a teng mite, a hingin paikhia ngeilo ding hi. Bethezel khuamite' kahna leh thumna na zak uh ciangin, tua khuasungah belh ding munmuan'huai a omlohna na thei ding uh hi
Topa in Jerusalem kulhpi dongah gimna lianpi tungsak ta ahih manin Maroth khuamite nakpi takin patau uh hi
Lakhish khua-ah a teng mite aw, na sakol galkapte uh a leeng bulh pak un. Note in Israel-te' khialhnateng zuikha na hih manun, Jerusalem zong a khialsakte na hi uh hi
Tu-in no Judah mite aw, Moresethgath khua, mangpha khak un. Israel kumpite in Akzib khua panin huhna ngahlo ding hi
Mareshah khuamite aw, note a hong zong dingpa ka hong paisak ding hi, Topa in ci hi. Adullam leihawm sungah Israel kumpipa bu ding hi
Judah mite aw, na it mahmah na tate uh, sal a suak dingin hong kilaksak ding ahih manin, amaute' hangin na dahna limun na sam uh met un la, musane bangin na lu uh tolsak un.
